ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test administration */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization responsible for the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_version" INTEGER /* Version of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test format */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery method */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "test_delivery_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test delivery server */,
  "test_delivery_database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test delivery database */,
  "test_created_date" TEXT /* Date the test was created */,
  "test_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_format_id") REFERENCES test_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_delivery_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_method_id") REFERENCES delivery_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_delivery_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_delivery_database_id") REFERENCES test_delivery_databases ("db_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_organization_name FOREIGN KEY ("organization_name") REFERENCES organizations ("org_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_delivery_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_delivery_server_id") REFERENCES test_delivery_servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "org_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "org_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the test format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_delivery_servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "server_description" TEXT /* Description of the server */,
  "server_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_delivery_databases" (
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string for the database */,
  "db_description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "db_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, educator) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "user_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being administered */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student taking the test */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student on the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the test result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the test result */,
  "result_created_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was created */,
  "result_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "student_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "student_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Description of the school */,
  "school_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "school_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)
